steps.name: stage-0-context-and-input-discovery
steps.comment: Collected mandatory context, identified active/restored specs, compared backend-aware specs with code and tests, and ran two reviewer agents plus one merger agent.

steps.name: ready-specs-conflict-safe-move
steps.comment: Moved ready specs to dev/docs/specs/realised without overwriting old realised docs. Removed active coding_agent_backend_spec.md only after confirming it was identical to the realised copy. Stored backend-aware session_watcher spec under a dated non-conflicting realised filename.

steps.name: stage-3-user-decision-pending
steps.comment: User rejected implementation of /next and /prev. Updated project_manager_spec.md to keep resolve_neighbor_project as internal/future API and remove Telegram command commitment from current scope.

steps.name: stage-3-user-decision-finding-002-pending
steps.comment: User accepted aligning process_manager_spec.md to code. Updated the spec to require explicit backend for backend-aware send_message and to remove current_backend_registry fallback from process_manager.

steps.name: stage-3-user-decision-finding-003-pending
steps.comment: User accepted finding-003 first option and blanket-accepted recommended options for remaining findings. Updated project_manager_spec, daily_session_registry_spec, session_manager_spec, unread_buffer_spec, and telegram_agent_backend_integration_spec.

steps.name: ready-specs-final-move-pending
steps.comment: Moved fixed backend-aware specs to realised. Used dated names for daily_session_registry, session_manager, process_manager to avoid overwriting old Claude-only realised specs.

steps.name: stage-5-final-review-pending
steps.comment: Final verifier agent found three high cross-spec inconsistencies: parent specs still described current_backend_registry fallback, project/watcher operational scans still used recent list API, and process_manager_spec still described obsolete claude_runner start_process(args) contract.

steps.name: stage-6-final-fixes
steps.comment: Applied accepted recommended fixes for all final verifier findings across coding_agent_backend, current_backend_registry, concrete backend, project_manager, session_watcher, and process_manager specs.

steps.name: stage-7-local-final-verification
steps.comment: Repeated verifier agent hung without writing artifacts and was stopped. Local final checks passed: no implicit backend fallback text, no recent-list API in operational project/watcher specs, no obsolete runner contract text, JSON artifacts valid, and targeted pytest returned 51 passed.
